name: leadmaster-scraper
description: Sistema automatizado para recolectar prospectos de anuncios patrocinados en Google Chrome

scripts.scraper:test: node src/scraper/leadmaster_scraper.js "presupuesto para reforma de oficinas en CABA"
scripts.db:status: mysql -u leadmaster_user -pleadmaster_password -e "USE leadmaster; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_prospectos FROM prospectos;"
scripts.db:view: mysql -u leadmaster_user -pleadmaster_password -e "USE leadmaster; SELECT id, palabra_clave, es_valido, DATE(fecha_hora) as fecha, LENGTH(texto_extraido) as chars FROM prospectos ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;"

author: OpenClaw LeadMaster
